response.overview: In Catteries Not Included, Chip 'n Dale are called in to solve the case of a catnapped kitten. But the Rescue Rangers find it a tough nut to crack when nutty Professor Nimnul and his giant robot bulldogs weave a diabolical plot of cat-astrophic proportions! Caper #2: Piratsy Under the Seas, while hunting for sunken treasure, Rescue Ranger Dale finds himself in need of rescuing from a gang of sea pi-rats...and Billy the Squid!
response.title: Chip 'n Dale Rescue Rangers: Crime-Busters
